items.title: CoreWeave Reports Strong Second Quarter 2025 Results
items.description: LIVINGSTON, N.J., August 12, 2025--CoreWeave, Inc. (Nasdaq: CRWV), the AI Hyperscaler™, today reported financial results for the second quarter ended June 30, 2025.

items.title: Can Rigetti's Chiplet Strategy Secure Its Spot in DARPA's Next Phase?
items.description: RGTI is betting on chiplet-based quantum systems to meet DARPA's benchmarks and secure a spot in its next program phase.

items.title: Supply Chain Security Market Surges to $5.14 Billion by 2030 - Led by IBM (US), Emerson (US), Oracle (US) | MarketsandMarkets™
items.description: Delray Beach, FL, Aug. 12, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- According to MarketsandMarkets™, the Supply Chain Security Market size is estimated to grow from USD 2.52 Billion in 2024 to USD 5.14 Billion by 2030 at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 12.6% during the forecast period. Browse in-depth TOC on "Supply Chain Security Market" 372 - Tables 54 - Figures 337 - Pages Download Report Brochure @ https://www.marketsandmarkets.com/pdfdownloadNew.asp?id=123703201 Supply Chain Security Market Dynamic

items.title: OX Security Appoints Ohad Cohen as Chief Revenue Officer to Accelerate Global Growth
items.description: OX, a leader in Application Security, today announced the appointment of Ohad Cohen as Chief Revenue Officer (CRO). In this role, Cohen will oversee global sales operations and go-to-market strategy, furthering OX Security's mission to enable organizations to focus solely on the cyber risks that actually matter, from code to runtime.

items.title: This Underrated AI Stock Is Profitable Yet Overlooked by Retail Investors
items.description: IBM is winning in enterprise artificial intelligence (AI).
